posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a solution provided by Monday.com agent, in her scenario. She is able to connect to board 1 in board 2.
Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

However, in my case, I am not able to do so.

Any idea on how to fix this?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Alammulia1

Where does this solution fail for you?

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Fantasy-Media-Team, the thing is I am not able to connect to 2 items of “Testing” board, in “Employee Performance” board. What I want to achieve is like the agent showing in 1:43, where you can see the item is connected to two items in board 1. The goal is to connect the items of board 1 in board 2 based on same person, as demonstrated in the video.
